title: saucer
blurb: a flying saucer drifts over an aurora night sky
note: accent is skyPalette.A3 (#7dcfff) — the cyan the aurora's brightest folds glow, and the saucer's own dome glass, so it ties the subject to the sky; posterTick 260 lands a lit flyby in both the landscape (190x48) and portrait (65x70) poster panes, so no posterTickPortrait is needed
